name: Wind Load Calculator
description: Calculates wind load on structures based on ISO 4354 and ASCE 7 standards, incorporating terrain, exposure, and dynamic factors.

inputs.label: Basic Wind Speed (V)
inputs.businessContext: Design wind speed at 10m height for the location, typically from local building codes.

businessContext_i18n.en: Design wind speed at 10m height for the location, typically from local building codes.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bölge için 10m yükseklikteki tasarım rüzgar hızı, genellikle yerel bina yönetmeliklerinden alınır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Bemessungswindgeschwindigkeit in 10 m Höhe für den Standort, typischerweise aus lokalen Bauvorschriften.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Vitesse de vent de conception à 10 m de hauteur pour le site, généralement issue des codes du bâtiment locaux.
businessContext_i18n.es: Velocidad de viento de diseño a 10 m de altura, típicamente de códigos de construcción locales.
businessContext_i18n.ar: سرعة الرياح التصميمية على ارتفاع 10 أمتار للموقع، عادةً من أكواد البناء المحلية.

inputs.label: Terrain Category
inputs.businessContext: Terrain roughness per ISO 4354: A=open sea, B=open country, C=suburban, D=urban.

businessContext_i18n.en: Terrain roughness per ISO 4354: A=open sea, B=open country, C=suburban, D=urban.
businessContext_i18n.tr: ISO 4354'e göre arazi pürüzlülüğü: A=açık deniz, B=açık arazi, C=banliyö, D=kentsel.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geländerauigkeit nach ISO 4354: A=offene See, B=offenes Land, C=vorstädtisch, D=städtisch.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rugosité du terrain selon ISO 4354 : A=mer ouverte, B=campagne ouverte, C=banlieue, D=urbain.
businessContext_i18n.es: Rugosidad del terreno según ISO 4354: A=mar abierto, B=campo abierto, C=suburbano, D=urbano.
businessContext_i18n.ar: خشونة التضاريس وفقًا لـ ISO 4354: A=بحر مفتوح، B=ريف مفتوح، C=ضواحي، D=حضري.

inputs.label: Building Height (z)
inputs.businessContext: Height above ground to the top of the structure.

businessContext_i18n.en: Height above ground to the top of the structure.
businessContext_i18n.de: Höhe über Grund bis zur Gebäudeoberkante.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Hauteur au-dessus du sol jusqu'au sommet de la structure.
businessContext_i18n.es: Altura sobre el suelo hasta la parte superior de la estructura.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الارتفاع فوق سطح الأرض إلى قمة الهيكل.

inputs.label: Exposure Factor (Ce)
inputs.businessContext: Adjustment for local topography and shielding, per ASCE 7.

businessContext_i18n.en: Adjustment for local topography and shielding, per ASCE 7.
businessContext_i18n.tr: ASCE 7'ye göre yerel topografya ve korunma için ayarlama.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anpassung für lokale Topographie und Abschirmung nach ASCE 7.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Ajustement pour la topographie locale et l'effet de masque, selon ASCE 7.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ajuste por topografía local y apantallamiento, según ASCE 7.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تعديل للتضاريس المحلية والحماية، وفقًا لـ ASCE 7.

inputs.label: Gust Effect Factor (G)
inputs.businessContext: Dynamic response factor for wind gusts, typically 0.85 for rigid structures.

businessContext_i18n.en: Dynamic response factor for wind gusts, typically 0.85 for rigid structures.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Rüzgar esintileri için dinamik tepki faktörü, rijit yapılar için tipik olarak 0.85.
businessContext_i18n.de: Dynamischer Antwortfaktor für Windböen, typischerweise 0,85 für starre Strukturen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de réponse dynamique aux rafales de vent, généralement 0,85 pour les structures rigides.
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de respuesta dinámica para ráfagas de viento, típicamente 0.85 para estructuras rígidas.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عامل الاستجابة الديناميكية لهبات الرياح، عادة 0.85 للهياكل الصلبة.

inputs.label: Pressure Coefficient (Cp)
inputs.businessContext: Aerodynamic shape factor for the building surface (positive for windward, negative for leeward).

businessContext_i18n.en: Aerodynamic shape factor for the building surface (positive for windward, negative for leeward).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bina yüzeyi için aerodinamik şekil faktörü (rüzgar yönünde pozitif, rüzgar altında negatif).
businessContext_i18n.de: Aerodynamischer Formfaktor für die Gebäudeoberfläche (positiv für Luv, negativ für Lee).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de forme aérodynamique pour la surface du bâtiment (positif au vent, négatif sous le vent).
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de forma aerodinámica para la superficie del edificio (positivo para barlovento, negativo para sotavento).
businessContext_i18n.ar: عامل الشكل الديناميكي الهوائي لسطح المبنى (موجب للجهة المواجهة للرياح، سالب للجهة الخلفية).

inputs.label: Air Density (ρ)
inputs.businessContext: Standard air density at sea level, adjust for altitude if needed.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard air density at sea level, adjust for altitude if needed.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Deniz seviyesinde standart hava yoğunluğu, gerekiyorsa irtifa için ayarlayın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Standard-Luftdichte auf Meereshöhe, bei Bedarf an die Höhe anpassen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Densité standard de l'air au niveau de la mer, ajuster pour l'altitude si nécessaire.
businessContext_i18n.es: Densidad estándar del aire a nivel del mar, ajustar por altitud si es necesario.
businessContext_i18n.ar: كثافة الهواء القياسية عند مستوى سطح البحر، اضبط حسب الارتفاع إذا لزم الأمر.

inputs.label: Cyclic Loading Consideration
inputs.businessContext: If true, applies fatigue reduction factor per ISO 4354 for dynamic wind events.

label_i18n.fr: Prise en compte du chargement cyclique

businessContext_i18n.en: If true, applies fatigue reduction factor per ISO 4354 for dynamic wind events.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Doğruysa, dinamik rüzgar olayları için ISO 4354'e göre yorulma azaltma faktörü uygulanır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wenn wahr, wird ein Ermüdungsreduktionsfaktor nach ISO 4354 für dynamische Windereignisse angewendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Si vrai, applique un facteur de réduction de fatigue selon ISO 4354 pour les événements de vent dynamiques.
businessContext_i18n.es: Si es verdadero, aplica el factor de reducción por fatiga según ISO 4354 para eventos de viento dinámicos.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إذا كان صحيحًا، يطبق عامل تقليل الإجهاد وفقًا لـ ISO 4354 لأحداث الرياح الديناميكية.

rules.message: For urban terrain (D) and heights >100m, consider using a more detailed wind tunnel study.
High wind speed with low exposure factor may indicate inconsistent input; verify local topography.

thresholds.message: Wind load exceeds 2000 Pa; structural reinforcement recommended.
Wind load exceeds 4000 Pa; immediate structural review required.

hiddenLossDrivers: Model uses normalized input chain — validate units
